scripts.build:packages: cd packages/shared-types && npm run build && cd ../shared-protocols && npm run build
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:packages && npm run lightning:start && concurrently -n proto,research,market,content,consumer,prairie-ridge,buildwell,web,sun-web,asc-web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,red,cyan,white,gray,cyan,white "npm run dev:protocol-api" "npm run dev:research-hub" "npm run dev:market-pulse" "npm run dev:content-forge" "npm run dev:agent-consumer" "npm run dev:prairie-ridge" "npm run dev:buildwell" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:prairie-ridge-frontend" "npm run dev:buildwell-frontend"
scripts.lightning:start: docker compose up -d bitcoind lnd lnd-init bitcoind-miner 2>/dev/null && ./scripts/lnd-env.sh 2>/dev/null || echo 'Lightning not available — skipping (set up docker-compose for payment demos)'
scripts.lightning:stop: docker compose stop bitcoind lnd lnd-init bitcoind-miner
scripts.lightning:logs: docker compose logs -f lnd lnd-init bitcoind-miner
scripts.lightning:status: docker compose ps bitcoind lnd lnd-init bitcoind-miner
scripts.lint: echo 'Protocol Lab lint not yet configured'
scripts.test:e2e: jest --config apps/prairie-ridge-app/jest-e2e.json && jest --config apps/buildwell-app/jest-e2e.json && jest --config apps/protocol-api/jest-e2e.json
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
